text:
Norwell (ノーウェル, Nōweru) was a soldier who provided finances to "One-Way People". Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 347 

Background

Norwell was a soldier that provided finances to people in need and because of his altruistic actions people started to donate to his account thereby starting the Norwell Fund. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Ging makes a large financial deposit into Norwell's eponymous fund in order to pay Muherr and his team for their acceptance of Ging becoming the number two of Beyond Netero's Dark Continent Expedition Team.
